source_limitations: All 72 legacy items remain unsupported by an exact combined sodium-or-potassium review section.
Severity, symptoms, ECG, renal context, medication context, fluid or gastrointestinal losses, repeat testing, treatment, referral, and timing require condition-specific clinician review.
This broad workflow remains a clinical blocker and must not produce autonomous interpretation, escalation, testing, medicine changes, or treatment.
No authoritative source record is committed for this workflow; all legacy clinical content was removed.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
